title: gymnopteris variabilis var. axillaris
intro: Gymnopteris variabilis var. axillaris, also known as the variable fern, is a type of fern found in various regions around the world, particularly in tropical and subtropical areas. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to reduce pain and swelling. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as lowering blood pressure, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Gymnopteris variabilis var. axillaris is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
